vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #740

plan.title: feat(skills,interview): plain-English UX pass — jargon, diff view, approval actions, button labels

narratives.Description: feat(skills,interview): plain-English UX pass -- jargon, diff view, approval actions, button labels
narratives.Problem: Per #151 (playtest issues #8, #9, #10, #11, #12, #17), non-technical users only complete the planning flow because they have an external AI translating jargon, decoding confirmations, and validating choices. Defects cluster: jargon without explanations (frontend/db/auth/deployment/PRD/Next.js), unclear approval actions (Accept/Refine/Edit), and alarming red/green diff view at PRD/SPEC review.
narratives.Acceptance: Jargon pass: every technical question gets a one-line plain-English context note; acronyms defined inline on first use (PRD, etc.); framework justifications explained or removed. Approval-action pass: explicit numbered approval menu (1=Approve, 2=Suggest changes, 3=Edit) replacing ambiguous buttons. Diff-view pass: one-line non-alarming preface above red/green diffs, or hide diff entirely on first review. Reference doc captures plain-English-pass guidelines for future skill authors. Tests cover jargon-on-first-use rule, approval-menu presence, and diff preface presence.
narratives.OutOfScope: Full review-UI redesign. Separate non-technical-user mode (#77/#84). Cost/budget transparency (#739). IP/legal risk flagging (#738).
narratives.Files: skills/deft-directive-interview/SKILL.md (jargon + acronyms); PRD review skill (approval menu); SPECIFICATION review skill (approval menu + diff preface); NEW references/plain-english-ux.md; tests/content/test_plain_english*.py (new); CHANGELOG.md (append).

items.title: Jargon audit + remediation across interview / PRD / spec review skills
Acronyms defined inline on first use (PRD, etc.) per skill
Explicit numbered approval menu after PRD review
Explicit numbered approval menu after SPECIFICATION review
Diff-view preface added (or diff hidden on first review)
NEW references/plain-english-ux.md guidelines for future skill authors
Tests: jargon-on-first-use rule + approval-menu presence + diff preface presence
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry under Changed referencing #740 (and #151 umbrella)

references.title: Issue #740: feat(skills,interview): plain-English UX pass — jargon, diff view, approval actions, button labels

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Urgent fixes to land ahead of broader roadmap work -- adoption blockers and bugs that block consumer adoption or successful first-session UX.
